programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Blue World Ep401: Maldives Manta Ray Feeding Frenzy + Venomous Sea Snakes
programme.desc: Blue World travels to the Maldives to witness a huge Manta ray feeding frenzy and then visits Indonesia to explore an island surrounded by venomous sea snakes!

programme.title: Hot Water Ep105: V8 Superboat Championships from Griffith in New South Wales, Australia
programme.desc: Hot Water showcases the world’s best in adrenalized water-related motorsports. This episode features Round 5 of Jet Sprinting from Cabarita in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Father Daughter Miracle Mile
programme.desc: Curtis and Autumn have an epic Father's Day on Wyoming's most famous Miracle Mile with Ugly Bug Fly Shop.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep101: Shark Business
programme.desc: Shark Business unravels some of the mysteries surrounding sharks with controversial behaviorist Dr. Erich Ritter. You'll witness divers testing the limits of shark-human interaction outside of cages with dangerous sharks such as lemon, bull and even great white sharks!

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep403: Whitewater Kayaking in Greenland, Siberia, Indonesia and Pakistan
programme.desc: The Sickline Kayak Team travels the world in search of big challenges. We join them as they visit Greenland, Siberia, Indonesia and Pakistan. The team enjoys the local sites and cultures, while kayaking some of our planet's most amazing whitewater rapids.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep116: O'ahu, Hawaii
programme.desc: Next Stop highlights underwater scooters, Wet N Wild Water Park, Tiki Grill and Bar, Aston Resort, and Makana with Lono and Lopaka.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep202: France’s Canal du Midi by Boat
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull cruises France’s historic Canal du Midi on an affordable, family-friendly “Le Boat” cruise.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep113: Bottom-Dwelling Sharks + Shark Feeding Frenzy
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV showcases Bottom-Dwelling Sharks and does a Deeper Dive analyzing how Sharks Breathe, Wobbegong Sharks and Caribbean Reef Sharks.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep210: Islands of Palau Guam
programme.desc: Exploring the islands of Palau and Guam includes a submarine view of the ocean wildlife, exploration of the battles of World War II, learning the culture of the locals and snorkeling among thousands of jellyfish. These islands have it all, including one of the most interesting foods Host Bill Ball has ever eaten—fruit bat.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: Flipside - NowHere Episode 1
programme.desc: Flipside is the show that takes you behind the scenes with Absinthe Films during the making of our latest snowboard movie - NowHere. Follow the life and times of a handful of the most progressive and entertaining riders in snowboarding. Our 2010 Flipside series is broadcasted in 10-12 minute webisodes on various websites including Transworld Snowboarding, MPORA and Swatch as well as on absinthe-films.com

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 11
programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we visit Zagreb, the capital of the country and one of the most popular destinations in Croatia. As a city with a rich history and an abundance of cultural events, it is the perfect place to include at the end of our Croatian adventure. Let's check it out!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1
programme.desc: Hello Sailors! It’s such a great pleasure to welcome you to the new season of Sail-ho Croatia. We’re setting off on yet another incredible journey sailing the Adriatic starting from the lush and picturesque Neretva valley and the town of Ploče. Stay tuned and enjoy the ride!

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 1
programme.desc: In this year's season of Kite Maters we follow the life of Toni Vodisek, an athlete that has everything needed to become a star and win multiple titles. He has already won three World Series events in a row and found himself close to the podium spots at the end of the year. Also we talk with Guy Bridge: a Professional Kite foil rider that tells us what it takes to become one of the best.

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 6

programme.title: Campus Life Experience - Episode 7
programme.desc: The educational program that lasted a week is finally reaching its end. programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: Wilbur works in an old carnival and shows some gruesome things to the puplic. He covered his face because he had a sadistic father who burned his face. Everybody makes jokes about his scars and when the new boss fired him, he go to an old swamp-witch who gives him a peace of wood from a hanging tree and Wilbur makes a mask from this piece of wood and put all his anger in this mask. When he puts the mask on, everybody who looks on this mask commits suicide. He has created the Death-Mask.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E07 - Swoop and Scoop
programme.desc: Wiedie and Chris designed their lives so they can experience all Jackson Hole has to offer. And when a young snowmobiler's first ride into the backcountry spins out of control, they join forces with Jess and Flip to execute a perfect 'swoop and scoop' rescue.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E15 - Hot Mess
programme.desc: Wardens gear up for the last week of the season. The pressure is on, putting the Wardens right in the middle of a hot mess.

programme.title: Wardens - S06:E16 - Long Day
programme.desc: When Elk start to migrate, the days get long. Wardens keep an eye on the herd and find that at night things start to get strange.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E07 - S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: In 1968, a new form of military policing was being developed in a rural area north of Los Angeles. The Los Angeles Police Department sent an observer to this unit, and he, in turn, took this knowledge back to the LAPD. This contributed to the development of the department’s first Special Weapons and Tactics (S.W.A.T.) team. This CQB episode takes an historical journey to examine how this incident affected and changed police tactics around the world. Using CQB’s trademark “sub-second” analysis, the program also looks at how police S.W.A.T. teams train, plan and equip themselves for the challenges of urban combat. The dramatization of a 1980s S.W.A.T. siege of a gang safe-house demonstrates the complicated challenge of protecting innocent people who might be caught in the line of fi re, as well as the specifics of the squad’s training regimen, how they communicated, and the special equipment they used.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E08 - Hunting Sarajevo Snipers
programme.desc: The Bosnian War was an extraordinarily complex event, with many layers of military involvement including NATO forces, national militaries, irregular paramilitary forces, mujahedeen revolutionaries, private security companies, and international intelligence personnel. One tactic in particular struck fear into the hearts of the military and civilians alike: the use of snipers positioned in high buildings. This edition of CQB investigates this specific combat technique and how it was countered by opposing forces. Taking viewers inside a “sniper‘s den,” the program explains how this tactic was so successfully used by rebel forces – and how traditional military techniques evolved to combat it.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E18 - The Queen Mother An Affectionate Tribute
programme.desc: The Queen Mother, who lived as long as the century itself, was a beloved figure in British life. She was a symbol of bravery during the Second World War and a timeless icon of steadiness, winning a deep affection from people that was only matched by the Queen herself.

programme.title: God Will Work It In!
programme.desc: Sometimes, even when your situation isn’t getting better, you are. Stop stressing like you need to do it alone and remember that God is with you in it. He’s already given you what you need — and He’ll help you work it in to what you’re facing.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.title: Not Something, But Someone
programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares a simple truth that can help you endure life’s hardest trials. True security isn't the absence of trouble; it’s the presence of a Savior who promises you’ll never walk through it alone.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia, crying, denies having killed Celso. Fausto manipulates the children into believing that their mother is the killer and must turn herself in. Camila eloquently presents her version of events and then tells Ezequiel that he lied to make Patricia pay for a crime she didn't commit, just like they did with their mother.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Omar and his boss demand a reconstruction of the facts - Patricia talks to Lorena and asks her to give Alberto a new chance, because she knows they still love each other - Claudio narrates the supposed way things happened on the day of Paco's death; but Norma can't stand such falsehood and interrupts the reconstruction shouting that everything Claudio said is a big lie.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Maria Lourdes appears before Judge Echeverri and turns herself in for the crime of corruption and accepting bribes from Gertrudis; she hands over a folder with documents that prove what she says to bring Mrs. Corona down with her - Gertrudis scoffs at Alberto's accusations and denies, once again, being a murderer. Alberto goes to the library, he cannot live knowing what his mother did and is unable to accept. A gunshot is heard and everything seems to indicate that Alberto committed suicide. Lorena, enraged, blames Gertrudis for what happened and the Chief corroborates the death of her son. Gertrudis falls to her knees, shattered, screaming like a wounded beast.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara Inés talks on the phone with Cirilo. Raul inadvertently overhears when she mentions that her sister Bernice tried to commit suicide.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Responding to Israel's call, Clara Inés and Raúl become tense as they do not know what truth the man wants to talk to them about.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana manages to take Tatianita away while Carlos Raul is left confronting the criminals to defend his mother.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos Raul is surprised when Ninoska appears before him with a child he claims to be his son.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se defiende fieramente de la agresión de Roberto y le cuenta a Max lo sucedido. La Madre Isabel, para ayudar a Camila, le confía a Ezequiel el motivo por el que Roberto la extorsiona. Max presiona a Camila para que le cuente toda la verdad.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto confiesa que fue él quien asesinó a Gabriel para inculpar a Camila. Camila, llora de alegría, al saberse inocente de esa muerte. Max le reitera su incondicional apoyo ratificándole su gran amor. Ezequiel expresa su intención de casarse con Camila

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel rechazado por Camila, la manipula con una nueva oferta de trabajo como asistente de su hija Julia y todo para tratar de conseguir su cercanía. Max, confía en el amor de Camila. Torrealba pide que unan esfuerzos para encontrar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: La Sangre Iluminada
programme.desc: Seis personajes explican su compleja existencia entrelazada. Cada cierto tiempo, debido a matemáticas inexplicables, la vida de estos personajes cambia y ocupan el cuerpo de otro

programme.title: Inquebrantable
programme.desc: Lupita vive en Ciudad Juárez con su hija Margarita, el esposo de Margarita es un alcohólico, mujeriego, y golpeador, la hija de Lupita, Margarita va a la universidad pero desde niña tiene una enfermedad de un mal cardiaco causado por la violencia domestica que ha sufrido desde niña, el doctor Villa le comenta a Lupita que Margarita su hija va a morir si no tiene un donante de corazón, desesperada ella se pone a vender cualquier cosa de valor que tenga en su casa para comprar el corazón en el mercado negro.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: El Peluquero Romántico
programme.desc: La vida del barbero de barrio Víctor transcurre bastante tranquila. Mantiene una estricta rutina diaria tanto en el trabajo como en casa, donde pasa las noches junto a su madre escuchando boleros o viendo películas de la Época de Oro del Cine Mexicano en la televisión. Su rutina se ve alterada cuando su madre muere repentinamente. Su coqueteo con una joven camarera y su reencuentro con una antigua novia no pueden llenar el vacío dejado por su madre. Sin embargo, eso cambia cuando un día un hombre que dice ser su padre entra repentinamente a la tienda. El encuentro lo llevará a un viaje inesperado y que le cambiará la vida a Río de Janeiro.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny son imigrantes indocumentados, un dia el patrón de Jenny trata de abusar de ella, Mickey lo sorprende y lo mata haceindo justicia por su propia mano así se desatan una cacería de criminales abusadores, todo lo sueben a las redes convirtiéndose en los anti-héroes más populares por hacer justicia a los desamparados.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.
